arcs.title: The Goblin Election
arcs.summary: Ragnok's reference filing is now public knowledge at Gringotts. Griphook the Younger has been 'thinking about it' for 48 hours and has not yet responded publicly. The owl bearing Christine's notification spent Saturday night at the Hollow Crown coordinates and is expected to arrive Sunday morning, possibly during breakfast. She does not yet know. Election board opening arguments are scheduled for Thursday. Day 3 should cover Christine receiving the owl, her reaction, and possibly an initial conversation — or pointed silence — with Ragnok.
